features: Lynx Sunset Fresh Win Big Gift set includes a full-size LYNX Sunset Fresh Body Wash 225 ml and Body Spray 150 ml, along with a chance to win FIFA World Cup 2026 tickets and other epic prizes*
Lynx Sunset Fresh Body Spray features even more odour-busting zinc technology to give you 48 hours of all-over freshness
This deodorant for men has got you covered with a long-lasting mango and mandarin scent, blended with the signature LYNX effect to leave you wanting more.
LYNX Sunset Fresh 3-in-1 Body Wash hydrates your skin and keeps you feeling fresh for 12 hours whilst leaving you smelling irresistible.
Includes is a chance to win FIFA World Cup 2026 tickets - 10x pairs including flights + hotel + £1k spending money *
Get set for every game and celebrate the FIFA World Cup 2026 with our gift collection. As proud official sponsor.
description: Product Description So, it’s gift-giving time again. The age-old question, ‘What will I get him?’ Relax. The answer’s simple. Time to take the guesswork out of getting it right and grab LYNX The Sunset Fresh Win Big Gift Set. Teaming full-size LYNX Sunset Fresh Body Wash and Deodorant Body Spray together, this set of gifts for him has got him covered with a long-lasting mango and mandarin scent, blended with the signature LYNX effect to leave you wanting more. But it doesn't stop there, this gift set also includes a chance to win FIFA World Cup 2026™ Tickets plus other epic prizes.* With just a few spritzes of our men's deodorant spray, you’ll have 48 hours of freshness and unbeatable confidence. We’re out here working smarter, not harder, with an aluminium-free formula that boasts even more odour-busting zinc technology than before. Turn your shower into a tropical retreat with LYNX Sunset Fresh 3-in-1 Body Wash. This hair, face and body cleanser kicks odour to the kerb and leaves you smelling irresistibly fresh for up to 12 hours. No matter how big or small life gets, you’ll always feel refreshed. Better still, this body cleanser contains moisturisers to hydrate your skin every time you shower.* *UK 18+. Opens 12:00, 6.8.25, Closes 23:59, 28.2.26. Purchase required. Retain pack containing unique code for entry. To enter, purchase Lynx Win Big Sunset Fresh Gift Set (whilst stocks last) and complete form at https://www.lynxformen.com/uk/winbig.html. Prizes: 10 trips for 2 to a FIFA World Cup 26™ Quarter Final match in the USA (‘Top Prize’); 150 Xbox packages; 250 x £100 cash; 1,000 £10 Amazon vouchers; 10,000 £5.95 Lynx vouchers and ~1m £1 Lynx vouchers. Top Prize: 2 FWC26™ Quarter Final tickets, 2 return flights from UK airport, 3 night 4* hotel stay, £1,000 spending money. Excludes visas & all other expenses. Must have a valid passport and authority to enter USA. Additional FIFA T&Cs applicable. Max 1 Top Prize per person. Smartphone, Internet access, PayPal account required. For full T&Cs, see [lynxformen.com/uk/winbig/terms.html Promoter and Data Controller: Unilever UK Limited. Ingredients Body Wash INGREDIENTS: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Glycerin, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Chloride, Parfum, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Lactic Acid, Disodium EDTA, PPG-6, Saccharide Isomerate, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Citrus Limon Peel Oil, Geraniol, Limonene, Linalool, Pinene, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Vanillin, CI 17200, CI 19140. Body Spray INGREDIENTS: Alcohol Denat., Butane, Isobutane, Propane, Parfum, Zinc Neodecanoate, Isopropyl Myristate, Amyl Salicylate, Benzyl Alcohol, Citral, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Citrus Limon Peel Oil, Coumarin, Eugenol, Geraniol, Limonene, Linalool, Pinene, Terpinolene, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Vanillin Directions Shower: Apply LYNX Sunset Fresh 3-in-1 Body Wash to hair, face, and body. Rinse off. Daily use. Body Spray: Spray LYNX Sunset Fresh Body Spray all over for 48 hours of freshness. Use anytime. Manufacturer Contact Information Unilever Dept ER, Wirral CH63 3JW UK See more
